title: TerraFirmaShips
body:
Compatibility for the TerraFirmaCraft and Small Ships mods.
  • Adds ships for every TFC wood type.
  • Adds textures which match with TFC boats.
  • Adds crafting recipes which use TFC ingredients.
  • Adds size and weight to Small Ships items.

Required dependencies: TerraFirmaCraft and Small Ships.
